description_long: This is a stylized biplane with a vibrant red and orange color scheme, featuring flame motifs on the tail and wingtips. The aircraft has two stacked wings with struts and wires connecting them, and a single wooden propeller mounted at the nose. The fuselage is rounded and tapers toward the tail, which has a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tailwheel, all fixed and exposed. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with a small windshield visible. Decorative details, such as insignias and stripes, enhance the classic, vintage appearance of the airplane.
description: A stylized red and orange biplane with flame motifs, open cockpit, and wooden propeller, featuring classic vintage design elements.
description_view_0: The left-front view highlights the propeller, open cockpit, and flame motifs on the tail and wings.
description_view_1: The top-down view shows the dual wings, decorative stripes, and insignias on the upper wing.
description_view_2: The right-rear view emphasizes the tail section, flame patterns, and the structure of the landing gear.
description_view_3: The direct front view displays the propeller, stacked wings, and the open cockpit behind the upper wing.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and supported by interplane struts; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two fixed main wheels and a small fixed tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing, forward-mounted on the fuselage with a small windshield.
